use std::process::{Command, Stdio};
use std::io::{BufRead, BufReader};

fn run_script(script: &str, max_bytes: usize) -> Result<String, String> {
    let mut child = Command::new("bash")
        .arg("-c")
        .arg(script)
        .stdout(Stdio::piped())
        .stderr(Stdio::piped())
        .spawn()
        .map_err(|e| format!("spawn failed: {e}"))?;

    let stdout = child.stdout.take().unwrap();
    let reader = BufReader::new(stdout);
    let mut output = Vec::new();
    let mut total = 0;
    for line in reader.lines() {
        let line = line.map_err(|e| format!("read error: {e}"))?;
        total += line.len() + 1;
        if total > max_bytes {
            return Err("output exceeded size limit".into());
        }
        output.push(line);
    }
    let status = child.wait().map_err(|e| format!("wait error: {e}"))?;
    if !status.success() {
        return Err(format!("process exited with {status}"));
    }
    Ok(output.join("\n"))
}

fn get_git_log(max_lines: usize) -> Result<String, String> {
    run_script(
        &format!("git log --oneline -{max_lines}"),
        max_lines * 256,
    )
}
